title: DIVCHI Cat Radiator Bed | Warm Fleece Hammock With Washable Cover | Hanging Radiator beds For Indoor Cats for Kittens & Cats (44x29x23cm) (White Pet Radiator Bed)
features: SOFT & LUXURIOUS MATERIAL The Petlicity Cat Radiator Bed is great for keeping your cat warm and cosy during the winter months. Made from a Soft and Luxurious Material, this handy accessory provides an ideal spot for your favourite feline to curl up and relax on.
EASY STORAGE & INSTALL Strong and Durable Metal Frame - Collapsible for Easy Storage. Cats, kitten and even small dogs or puppies. Easy to install and fits most radiators.

PETS LIKE WARM PLACE Soft and Luxurious Removable Machine Washable Plush Faux Fur Cover. Sleeve. Cat like warm and cuddly places, with this radiator bed you give your cat a new place. Ideal for all cats and small dogs.

PERFECT FOR COLD WINTER DAYS Suitable for Cats and Small Pets Up to 5Kg. This wonderful product is perfect for cats and small dogs, especially through the cold winter months to provide a nice, warm and cosy place for your pets to sleep or relax for the cold winter days / nights.
DIMENSIONS H25cm x W46cm x D30cm / 10" x 18" x 12" (approx).
description: Product Description DIVCHI Presents Cat Radiator Bed Puppy Pet Warm Fleece Bed Basket Cradle Hammock COMFORTABLE RADIATOR BED - The DIVCHI Cat or Dog Radiator Bed is a novel, fun & comfortable way for keeping your cat, dog or other small animal warm & cosy during the winter months using spare heat from your domestic radiators. This radiator cat bed is an ideal and comfy place for your cat to sleep. SOFT & COMFY SOFT & COMFY - Made from a soft, plus & luxurious material, this sturdy accessory provides an ideal spot of personal space for your favourite feline or canine to curl up & relax on, allowing them to soak up excess heat produced by your standard radiators. It has a comfy cover which provides comfort. STRONG & DURABLE STRONG & DURABLE - A strong and durable metal frame is covered with the soft and luxurious plush faux-fur sleeve. The cover is fully machine washable, with the whole thing folding flat for storage or travel when not needed. STYLISH & EYE-CATCHY STYLISH & EYE-CATCHY - The hanging cat bed impresses with its unique and timeless design. The beautiful cat bed is a real warm eye-catcher!
